name: Jungle Chains
short_description: You are chained to your friends and must climb to the top. One wrong move can decide your friendship.
detailed_description:
In the exhilarating journey "Jungle Chains" the ultimate objective is to conquer the heights while being chained and reach the top with friends. With every journey commencing from a single step, you'll embark on an extraordinary quest of ascension.

  • Scale the Heights Alone or with Friends: 1-4 Players!

Jungle Chains is a unique multiplayer adventure where you and your friends must conquer treacherous terrains and work together to reach the summit—all while being chained up. Cooperation is key, as every move affects your entire team. Will you overcome the obstacles and prove that no chain is stronger than your bond, or will you be dragged down by the weight of the challenge? Find out in this exhilarating test of friendship and teamwork.

Embark on the climb of your life. Remember, nobody said this is going to be easy.

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Greek, Hungarian, Japanese, Korean, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Swedish, Traditional Chinese, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese
*languages with full audio support
